---
title: "EDA"
output: html_document
---


```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
setwd("C:/Users/kevin/Documents/research/meBART/vignettes/schluter_etal_immune")

url <- "https://static-content.springer.com/esm/art%3A10.1038%2Fs41586-020-2971-8/MediaObjects/41586_2020_2971_MOESM3_ESM.zip"

download.file(url, destfile = "schluter_etal_immune.zip")

# List files in the zip archive
zip_contents <- unzip("schluter_etal_immune.zip", list = TRUE)

# Filter out problematic files (e.g., those with "Icon" or "__MACOSX")
valid_files <- zip_contents$Name[!grepl("Icon|__MACOSX", zip_contents$Name)]

# Unzip only the valid files
unzip("schluter_etal_immune.zip", files = valid_files, exdir = "data", junkpaths = TRUE)


```


```{r}

data_dir <- "./data/"
list_of_files = list.files(path = data_dir)
filenames <- basename(list_of_files)
filenames <- filenames[grepl("\\.csv$", filenames)]

for (filename in filenames){

  assign(sub("\\.csv$", "", filename), read_csv(paste0(data_dir, filename), show_col_types = FALSE))
  
}

```


```{r}

```
